title: 'null' from copy into gets wrong
poc: select * from testnull will give now an empty value.\\r\\n \\r\\n While: insert into testnull values('null');
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE testnull (test varchar(10) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE testdata (id INT PRIMARY KEY, description VARCHAR(255), value CLOB);
INSERT INTO testdata (id, description, value) VALUES (1, 'Test', NULL);
SELECT * FROM testnull WHERE test IS NULL OR test = 'null';
